title: cycladenia humilis var. typica
intro: Cycladenia humilis var. typica, also known as desert marigold, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of desert marigold include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. Desert marigold can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with herbal preparations often using the plant's flowers and leaves to create a variety of medicinal products.
